meta.title: How to pick LoRA fine-tuning parameters?
meta.description:
➡️ More Resources and Support at Trelis.com/About

TIMESTAMPS
0:00 Welcome
1:50 Mistral v0.3
4:40 Phi-3 models
9:20 Full fine-tuning
14:20 LoRA
39:40 Picking LoRA alpha and rank
51:30 Running training with SFTTrainer from TRL

In this video I run through how to choose fine-tuning parameters including:
- LoRA alpha and rank
- Learning rate and schedule
- Batch size
- Optimizations (e.g. rank stabilized LoRA, loftQ, LoRA+)

Notebook link: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1WMbFXQoZZNZ0B4_RJwWvXXZAJZMGyvdq?usp=sharing
